title: Tahini Date Pudding
description: A creamy, sweet, and savory Mexican-inspired dessert featuring the unique flavors of tahini and date.
instructions: In a blender, combine tahini, dates, savory paste, sugar, and vanilla extract. Blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together pudding mix and milk until well combined.
Add the blended tahini mixture to the pudding mixture and whisk until smooth.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, sprinkle with salt and serve chilled.
